titleStmt.title: SII 15.75: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 75. (B.K. No. 192 of 1926-27.) KŌḌIKOP, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the fragment of a stone set up near the front wall of the Mūla Brahmēśvara temple.

After the king's pras11asti his feudatory of the Sinda family is described. The name of this chief, the date and other details are lost. It seems to record a gift of land as gathered from the mention of the boundaries in the obliterated portion. The epigraph is badly worn out.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.]
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa [śrīmattribhuvana malla-]
vīrasōmēśvaradēva vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkka tāraṁbaraṁ salutta
mire . tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara¨rssiṁda kuḷaka
maḷamā[¨rtta]ṁḍarappa nvaya meṁteṁdaḍe
ye vane
worn out
tanayaṁ
worn out
rājadhāni
worn out. This portion contains references to the boundaries, apparently of the gift land
Digital edition of SII 15.75 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
